parsed_output.justification: Based on the night phase transcript, Paul started as the Werewolf and Mike started as the Minion. Mitchell, claiming the Troublemaker role, stated that he swapped the cards of Paul and Caitlynn. Since Caitlynn admitted to starting as the Tanner, the swap between Paul (Werewolf) and Caitlynn (Tanner) means Caitlynn ended the night as the Werewolf. Therefore, eliminating Caitlynn is the only way for Team Village to win.
